data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Rejection with reason (sends back to previous party)'. However, the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that the system captures a rejection reason or sends the request back to the previous party. The linked use case describes a rejection scenario but lacks concrete evidence of the implementation of this requirement, indicating a gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of the system capturing rejection reasons or sending back to the previous party.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
